images.label: WhisperingForest
images.prompt: A mist-shrouded maple forest at twilight, gnarled crimson trees whispering with faint spectral glyphs;沈渊 in a high-collared tech-weave coat and gray scarf walks beside a translucent gray-robed figure whose edges flicker like unstable holograms; low-angle wide shot, shallow depth of field, volumetric fog catching amber backlight from dying sun; cinematic sci-fi style with moody chiaroscuro lighting, intricate biomechanical leaf veins glowing faintly, wind-swept particles frozen mid-air.

images.label: RuinedSanctum
images.prompt: Abandoned Tang-dynasty-style temple ruins under bruised violet twilight sky;沈渊 pushes open a warped wooden door releasing dust motes and greenish bioluminescent spores; inside: cracked stone floor, collapsed ceiling revealing stars, a single oil lamp casting long trembling shadows; medium interior shot, centered composition, dramatic rim lighting from lamp flame highlighting沈渊's sharp profile and the gray figure's semi-transparent form standing hesitantly behind him; atmospheric sci-fi anime style with desaturated teal-amber palette and subtle circuit-patterned cracks on ancient walls.

images.label: MemoryScroll
images.prompt: Close-up of a cracked jade data-scroll (yu jian) floating above a weathered wooden table, emitting soft pulsating cyan light that illuminates沈渊's focused face and the gray figure's trembling hands as fragmented memory-holograms—black-robed masked figures, burning imperial seals, a blood-red moon—flicker around them; tight frame, shallow focus, warm lamplight mixing with cold scroll glow; cyberpunk-infused xianxia sci-fi style, hyper-detailed textures, micro-lens flare, ethereal particle diffusion, no visible UI or interface elements.
